Calculations¶

Aggregations¶

Aggregation calculations for flight statistics.

async pilotlog.calculations.aggregations.calculate_career_statistics(session: AsyncSession, date_from: date | None = None, date_to: date | None = None) → dict[source]¶

Calculate overall career statistics.

Parameters:

  • session – Database session

  • date_from – Filter start date

  • date_to – Filter end date

Returns:

{

“total_flights”: 4388, “total_block_minutes”: 503102, “total_block_formatted”: “8385:02”, “unique_airports”: 125, “unique_aircraft”: 874, “date_range”: {“first_flight”: “2014-02-19”, “last_flight”: “2025-12-31”}, “by_aircraft_type”: […], “by_year”: […]

}

Return type:

Dictionary with career stats

pilotlog.calculations.aggregations.calculate_most_frequent_airports(airports: list[dict], top_n: int = 10) → list[dict][source]¶

Get the most frequently visited airports.

Parameters:

  • airports – List of airport statistics

  • top_n – Number of top airports to return

Returns:

Top N airports sorted by total visits (departures + arrivals)

pilotlog.calculations.aggregations.calculate_most_frequent_routes(routes: list[dict], top_n: int = 10) → list[dict][source]¶

Get the most frequently flown routes.

Parameters:

  • routes – List of route statistics

  • top_n – Number of top routes to return

Returns:

Top N routes sorted by count

pilotlog.calculations.aggregations.calculate_route_intensity(count: int, max_count: int) → float[source]¶

Calculate route intensity for visualization (0.0 to 1.0).

Uses logarithmic scaling for better visual distribution.

Parameters:

  • count – Number of times this route was flown

  • max_count – Maximum count across all routes

Returns:

Intensity value between 0.0 and 1.0

async pilotlog.calculations.aggregations.calculate_route_statistics(session: AsyncSession, date_from: date | None = None, date_to: date | None = None) → list[dict][source]¶

Calculate route statistics for map visualization.

Parameters:

  • session – Database session

  • date_from – Filter start date

  • date_to – Filter end date

Returns:

[
{

“origin”: “KHOU”, “destination”: “KDEN”, “count”: 367, “total_minutes”: 42000, “first_flown”: “2014-03-15”, “last_flown”: “2025-01-30”

]

Return type:

List of route statistics

Rolling¶

Rolling window calculations for flight time totals.

pilotlog.calculations.rolling.calculate_burn_rate(current_minutes: int, window_days: int, limit_minutes: int) → dict[source]¶

Calculate burn rate and projected limit date.

Parameters:

  • current_minutes – Minutes flown in the window

  • window_days – Number of days in the window

  • limit_minutes – Regulatory or contractual limit

Returns:

{

“daily_rate”: 4.5, # hours per day “remaining_minutes”: 1200, “days_to_limit”: 45, “projected_limit_date”: “2025-03-15”

}

Return type:

Dictionary with burn rate info

async pilotlog.calculations.rolling.calculate_rolling_totals(session: AsyncSession, as_of_date: date | None = None, windows: list[int] | None = None) → dict[int, dict][source]¶

Calculate flight time totals for rolling windows.

Parameters:

  • session – Database session

  • as_of_date – Calculate totals as of this date (default: today)

  • windows – List of window sizes in days (default: [7, 30, 60, 90, 365])

Returns:

{

7: {“flights”: 12, “minutes”: 1850, “formatted”: “30:50”}, 30: {“flights”: 45, “minutes”: 7200, “formatted”: “120:00”}, …

}

Return type:

Dictionary mapping window size to stats

pilotlog.calculations.rolling.format_minutes(minutes: int) → str[source]¶

Format minutes as H:MM.

PilotLog
